summary: Data Quality & Accounting test suite completed for Safe-Spend API. 30/30 tests passed covering: Cross-escrow balance consistency (3 tests), Spend flow vs ledger & audit (9 tests), Daily/Weekly/Monthly tracking integrity (5 tests), Idempotency & double-spend protection (2 tests), Orphan detection & referential integrity (7 tests), and Accounting equations verification (3 tests). All accounting math verified correct.

tests: Create 3 escrows for Org A (escA1: $500, escA2: $200, escA3: $0)
Fund escrows and verify balance_cents matches funding
Org isolation - Org B cannot see/access Org A's escrows (404)
Create policy P1 with per-tx=10000, daily=30000, monthly=100000, vendors=[Anthropic,OpenAI]
S1: 5000 cents to Anthropic - approved, balance_before=50000, balance_after=45000
S2: 7500 cents to Anthropic - approved, balance_before=45000, balance_after=37500
S3: 25000 cents to Anthropic - denied (per-transaction limit exceeded)
S3b: Daily limit test - 10000 approved, then 10000 denied (daily limit exceeded)
S4: 5000 cents to BlockedVendorX - denied (vendor not in allowlist)
Verify balance=27500, total_spent=22500, total_denied=40000
Verify spend_requests balance_before/after chain integrity
Verify audit_events for each spend (approved and denied)
Create policy P2 on escA2 with per-tx=10000
Execute T1: 2000, T2: 3000, T3: 5000 (all approved)
Verify daily_spend_tracking: total=10000, count=3
Verify weekly_spend_tracking: total=10000, count=3
Verify monthly_spend_tracking: total=10000, count=3
Verify tracking tables match spend_requests aggregation
Send spend with same idempotency_key 3 times - exactly 1 row created
Balance decreased by exactly 1000 once (not 3000)
Different idempotency keys create separate spend requests
No orphaned spend_requests (all reference valid escrows)
No orphaned approvals (all reference valid spend_requests)
No orphaned audit_events for orgs (all reference valid organizations)
No orphaned audit_events for escrows (all reference valid escrows)
No orphaned policies (all reference valid escrows)
No orphaned tracking records (daily, weekly, monthly)
Cascade delete integrity verified
All escrows: funded - spent = balance
Sum of approved spend_requests matches total_spent_cents
Sum of denied spend_requests matches total_denied_cents

critical_code_review_comments: Rules engine correctly evaluates in order: per-tx limit before daily limit
Idempotency protection working correctly - prevents double-spend
Balance tracking is accurate with balance_before/after chain integrity
Audit events properly logged for all spend operations
Referential integrity maintained - no orphaned records
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test organizations, 3 escrow accounts (escA1: $500, escA2: $200, escA3: $0), 2 policies, and multiple spend requests for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Data Quality & Accounting testing completed. All 30 tests passed. Key findings: 1) Balance math is correct (funded - spent = balance), 2) total_denied_cents tracks denied amounts correctly, 3) Daily/weekly/monthly tracking tables match spend_requests, 4) Idempotency prevents double-spend, 5) No orphaned records. The rules engine evaluates per-transaction limit before daily limit, so a 25000 cent spend is denied for per-tx limit (10000) before reaching daily limit check.

data_quality_verification.balance_consistency: VERIFIED - All escrow balances match funded - spent
data_quality_verification.audit_trail: VERIFIED - All spends have corresponding audit events
data_quality_verification.idempotency: VERIFIED - Prevents double-spend with same key
data_quality_verification.referential_integrity: VERIFIED - No orphaned records in any table
